findings.description: Loss of text alignment and line breaks in headers and address block.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the top header section consists of multiple centered lines. In the HTML, this is rendered as a single, continuous, left-aligned string of text. Additionally, the contact address block at the bottom is centered in the PDF but left-aligned in the HTML.

findings.description: The HTML document lacks semantic heading tags (e.g., <h1>). The main document title is formatted using bold text inside a paragraph block rather than a structural heading.
findings.evidence:
The title block uses `

SUMMARY OF NOTICE OF...

` instead of an `

` element.
